# Unusual Technologies

> Creative technology studio based in Brighton, UK. We specialise in immersive, interactive and high-tech solutions across academic, entertainment, arts and commercial sectors.

## Company

- Founded in 2018
- Based in Brighton, United Kingdom
- Website: https://unusualtechnologies.com/
- Email: hello@unusualtechnologies.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/unusualtechnologies/

## Leadership

- Douglas Kelly, Director
- Matt West, Technical Director
- James Alvarez, Lead Engineer

## What We Do

We develop creative digital products including games, apps, VR/AR experiences, interactive installations, visual effects, and web platforms. Our work spans client projects and internal R&D across these areas:

- Game development (Unity, Unreal Engine)
- Virtual reality and augmented reality
- Mobile apps (iOS, Android)
- Web applications and platforms
- Visual effects and animation
- Interactive installations and experiences
- AI tools and integrations
- Health and science research applications

## Key Pages

- [About Us](https://unusualtechnologies.com/about/): Team, clients, testimonials, awards, and values
- [Projects](https://unusualtechnologies.com/projects/): Portfolio of case studies across all disciplines
- [Concept & Design](https://unusualtechnologies.com/concept-and-design/): Our process from ideas to delivery
- [Contact](https://unusualtechnologies.com/contact/): Get in touch
- [Careers](https://unusualtechnologies.com/careers/): Open positions

## Selected Projects

- Co-Cog: Cognitive monitoring app for early-stage dementia, developed with NHS and university researchers
- LEGO Playtables: Interactive play experiences for LEGO
- RAF Museum: Digital experience for the Royal Air Force Museum
- OceanX: Marine exploration interactive experience
- Lost Horizon: Virtual festival experience
- The Tarot Experience: VR tarot reading experience
- Botsworth: AI-powered conversational bot
